name: UBA : Sharing Policy Changed or Shared External (SharePoint/OneDrive)
notes: Detects when a SharePoint or Onedrive sharing policy is changed or is shared externally.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250932) SharingPolicyChanged, (101250080) File or folder shared with external user
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Sharing Policy Changed or Shared External (SharePoint/OneDrive) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250932) SharingPolicyChanged, (101250080) File or folder shared with external user
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Sharing Policy Changed or Shared External (SharePoint/OneDrive)
